from delivery.client_pool import ClientPool
from delivery.config import load_endpoint
from delivery.router import DeliveryRouter


def test_empty_optional_overrides_leave_base_values_effective():
    config = load_endpoint(
        {
            "service": "webhook",
            "endpoint": "https://primary.invalid",
            "token": "primary-token",
            "revision": 6,
        },
        {"DELIVERY_ENDPOINT": "", "DELIVERY_TOKEN": ""},
    )
    assert (config.endpoint, config.token) == (
        "https://primary.invalid",
        "primary-token",
    )


def test_reload_rotates_existing_and_new_topic_dependencies():
    pool = ClientPool()
    initial = load_endpoint(
        {
            "service": "webhook",
            "endpoint": "https://region-a.invalid",
            "token": "token-a",
            "revision": 1,
        },
        {},
    )
    router = DeliveryRouter(initial, pool)
    before = router.deliver("orders", {"number": 10})
    assert (before.endpoint, before.credential) == (
        "https://region-a.invalid",
        "token-a",
    )

    rotated = load_endpoint(
        {
            "service": "webhook",
            "endpoint": "https://region-b.invalid",
            "token": "token-b",
            "revision": 2,
        },
        {},
    )
    router.reload(rotated)
    recurring = router.deliver("orders", {"number": 11})
    unseen = router.deliver("refunds", {"number": 12})
    assert (recurring.endpoint, recurring.credential) == (
        "https://region-b.invalid",
        "token-b",
    )
    assert (unseen.endpoint, unseen.credential) == (
        "https://region-b.invalid",
        "token-b",
    )
